summary: Made one surgical exit-continuity edit by placing the printed divorce packet on top of Leela's reading log and the co-op assessment notice, aligning Chapter 1's overnight table scene with the paper bundle Nita carries into Chapter 2. The opening already differed structurally from the adjacent chapter opening, so no entry rewrite was needed.
edits: Placed the divorce packet physically on Leela's unsigned reading log and the co-op assessment notice to match the Chapter 2 handoff.
